title: serratula tinctoria subsp. seoanei
intro: Serratula tinctoria subsp. seoanei, also known as Seoane's serratula, is a subspecies of a flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a perennial herb native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Serratula tinctoria subsp. seoanei can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are said to offer health benefits such as relieving fever, reducing inflammation, and promoting a healthy respiratory system.
